2606.26879.title: A Pipeline for Generating Longitudinal Synthetic Clinical Notes Using Large Language Models
2606.26879.paper_summary: Synthetic data is increasingly used to enable the development and evaluation of AI systems in domains where access to real-world data is restricted. In healthcare, clinical documentation presents particular challenges due to its sensitivity. This work introduces a synthetic clinical notes pipeline and dataset designed to support the development of clinical AI tools while avoiding the privacy risks associated with real patient data. The dataset is generated using a modular pipeline that combines structured patient generation, semi-structured patient journey simulation, and unstructured clinical note generation using large language models. The pipeline is designed to prioritise internal consistency across longitudinal patient records, while also capturing variation in writing style, note structure, and clinical detail. Additional mechanisms, including LLM-based validation and augmentation steps, are used to improve faithfulness, realism, and diversity of the generated notes. We release a dataset of 70 synthetic patients, each associated with 20-50 clinical notes spanning a full hospital journey. The dataset is provided at multiple levels of validation, enabling users to balance realism and scalability depending on their use case. This dataset supports the development, testing, and evaluation of clinical AI systems, including summarisation tools, coding models, and decision support systems, without reliance on real patient data.
2606.26879.paper_summary_zh: 合成數據越來越多地被用來促進在現實世界數據獲取受限的領域中開發和評估人工智慧系統。在醫療保健領域，臨床文檔因其敏感性而面臨特定挑戰。本研究介紹了一個合成臨床筆記管道和數據集，旨在支持臨床人工智慧工具的開發，同時避免與真實患者數據相關的隱私風險。該數據集是通過一個模組化管道生成的，該管道結合了結構化患者生成、半結構化患者旅程模擬和使用大型語言模型的非結構化臨床筆記生成。該管道旨在優先考慮縱向患者記錄之間的內部一致性，同時捕捉寫作風格、筆記結構和臨床細節的變化。還使用了包括基於LLM的驗證和增強步驟在內的附加機制，以提高生成筆記的真實性、現實性和多樣性。我們發布了一個包含70名合成患者的數據集，每名患者都與20-50份涵蓋完整醫院旅程的臨床筆記相關聯。該數據集提供了多個驗證級別，使得用戶可以根據其使用案例平衡現實性和可擴展性。這個數據集支持臨床人工智慧系統的開發、測試和評估，包括摘要工具、編碼模型和決策支持系統，而無需依賴真實患者數據。
2606.26879.author: William Poulett et.al.
2606.26879.authors: William Poulett, Alice Waterhouse, Ben Wallace, Scarlett Kynoch, Amaia Imaz Blanco, Michael Spence, Jonathan Pearson
